994.reason: [The original code had overly complex lookahead logic using PreToken() that incorrectly tried to distinguish between Decl, FuncDef, and MainFuncDef by peeking ahead. According to the grammar CompUnit → {Decl} {FuncDef} MainFuncDef, it should simply parse all Decl first, then all FuncDef, then exactly one MainFuncDef without complex lookahead.]
